step_rationale: STEMI biomarker and cardioprotective amino acid; altered metabolism in acute myocardial injury.
mechanism: Dysregulated glutamine metabolism in acute myocardial injury reflects impaired amino-acid homeostasis and cardiomyocyte energetics.
